result.stdout:
Description:
  Update a solution's .suo file to use a multiple startup project configuration in Visual Studio using all projects that set <IsDefaultMultiStartupProject> to true

Usage:
  startup-projects [<solution>] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <solution>  Optional path of the solution [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-startup-projects-2.0.0-0e1f283034a945dc9ed01c87f5ed0bac]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information


Commands:
  list  List all projects in the given solution with <IsDefaultMultiStartupProject> set to true
  set   Updates the given solution's .suo file with the configured startup projects

result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates the given solution's .suo file with the configured startup projects

Usage:
  startup-projects [<solution>] set [options]

Arguments:
  <solution>  Optional path of the solution [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-startup-projects-2.0.0-0e1f283034a945dc9ed01c87f5ed0bac]

Options:
  -v, --vs <2019|2022>  Visual Studio versions to target [default: 2022]
  -y, --yes             Automatically answer "yes" to any prompts
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information
